insight_tenant_id.title: Insight Tenant ID
insight_tenant_id.description: Tenant isolation identifier for the ingestion layer. Used as a partition key in Bronze and joined to silver tables.

hubspot_access_token.title: Private App Access Token
hubspot_access_token.description: HubSpot Private App access token. Create under Settings → Integrations → Private Apps. Token must have CRM + properties read scopes for every enabled stream.

hubspot_start_date.title: Start Date
hubspot_start_date.description: UTC start (YYYY-MM-DD) for the initial incremental sync. Records with updatedAt older than this are skipped on first run. Leave blank to fall back to 2 years before now.
